ProxyLens MVP

Inspect live API traffic without changing the client.

Route any request through a project slug, capture the upstream exchange, and watch request and response details land in a live debugging workspace.

Go + GinSQLite historySSE live feedStatic Next.js shell

Quick Start

Landing
  1. 1. Create a project with a unique slug and upstream base URL.
  2. 2. Send traffic to `/proxy/your-slug/*path`.
  3. 3. Filter logs, inspect headers and payload previews, and watch the live feed.
